title: Sinytra Connector #1343 (swimming fix)
description: Workaround for Sinytra Connector issue #1343, which breaks attributes such as SWIM_SPEED
body:
# No longer necessary as of Sinytra Connector v2.0.0-beta.10!

***

This mod implements a workaround for [https://github.com/Sinytra/Connector/issues/1343](https://github.com/Sinytra/Connector/issues/1343), which prevents swimming (and causes a few other issues) when Sinytra Connector and certain Fabric mods are installed alongside one another. It will be taken down once the issue is properly fixed upstream.

More specifically, this mod fixes NeoForge's built-in attributes after Sinytra Connector accidentally nullifies them - including SWIM_SPEED.
